title: Evaluating Demographic Data to Improve Confidence in Equity Analytics in a Children's Hospital.
ehr_evidence: the electronic health record team standardized race and ethnicity fields... all fields are sourced from the same electronic health record field.
summary: Evaluation of demographic data collection and infrastructure at Akron Children’s Hospital to improve health equity analytics.
key_findings: Standardized race and ethnicity fields with federal definitions.
Provided 7 recommendations for aligning health equity data analytics.
study_design: Quality improvement (QI) project / data infrastructure evaluation
limitations: limitations to a seldom-populated Race 2 field
